label: Record
name: Substance Use Disorder Patient Record
description: Records maintained in connection with the performance of any part 2 program

label: PatientIdentifyingInformation
name: Patient Identifying Information
description: Data that identifies someone as an SUD patient which must be protected from disclosure

label: SudCounselingNotes
name: SUD Counseling Notes
description: Information excluded from standard records which require separate consent mechanics

label: UnsecuredRecord
name: Breached Record
description: A record subject to notification requirements under Section 2.16
